rationale: No conflict. §29.1533 governs prekindergarten site-sharing considerations; it does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or school revenue formulas affected by the proposed §11.13(b) increase.
quote: Before establishing a new prekindergarten program, a school district shall consider the possibility of sharing use of an existing Head Start or other child-care program site as a prekindergarten site.
_note: The two provisions operate in unrelated domains—property tax exemptions vs. prekindergarten program siting. No textual or operational conflict identified.
